criminal_summary.case_numbers_xls: Cr. No. 325/2014, Theppakulam (Law and order) Police Station, Madurai City, Madurai District, Tamilnadu, J.M.NO.1, MADURAI, MADURAI DISTRICT, STC NO. 363/2014, U/S 341, 143, 188-IPC Act and 4AA-TNOPPD Act. Brief description: Case for obstructing traffic and public by marching with Congress party flag to collect votes in front of Dinamani Theater, Munsichalai, Madurai Town on 07.04.2014, while election conduct rules and police ban on processions were in force.
